Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "SOLOFLIGHT-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Solo Flight.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers 2. Executes the RUN command
Line number 4 of the BASIC program has also been patched to check for S=1 instead of S=0 to skip the file loading.
The loading screen is from the disk version.
Note: to dump, simply set a breakpoint on $3E00.
